findings.description: Source file contains 3 h2 headings (テスト準備, テスト実施, テスト結果エビデンスの収集) but the knowledge file consolidates all content into a single section (s1). While the total content is small and the consolidation preserves all information, the section count does not match the source structure.
findings.source_evidence: RST h2 headings: 'テスト準備', 'テスト実施', 'テスト結果エビデンスの収集' (appears twice as a duplicate in source)
